final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for 大话西游.

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster design (Wong Kar-wai era), 王家卫 film typography tradition, 徐克 wuxia color grading heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in an embrace/kiss on the city wall as the central focal point, 牛魔王 standing in the distance, 唐僧 standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall setting from 大话西游
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
